definition_en: A round red or green fruit that is white inside.
sentence_1: I want to eat a sweet apple.
sentence_2: She gave me a big red apple.

definition_en: A set of printed pages inside a cover, that you read.
sentence_1: Please put the book on the table.
sentence_2: I read a very good book yesterday.

definition_en: A common animal with four legs, often kept as a pet.
sentence_1: My dog likes to run in the park.
sentence_2: They have a small friendly dog.

definition_en: Feeling or showing pleasure; pleased and glad.
A place where children go to learn and study.
sentence_1: I walk to school every morning.
sentence_2: Our school has a big library.

definition_en: The clear liquid that falls as rain and is in rivers.
sentence_1: Please drink a glass of fresh water.
sentence_2: The plants need some clean water.

definition_en: A person who you know and like very much.
sentence_1: He is my best friend at school.
sentence_2: We played together with a friend.

definition_en: Very attractive and pleasing to look at.
sentence_1: Look at that beautiful blue sky.
sentence_2: This is a beautiful flower garden.

definition_en: To get knowledge or skill in a new subject.
sentence_1: We learn many new English words.
sentence_2: He wants to learn how to swim.

definition_en: The ability to control your fear in a dangerous situation.
sentence_1: It takes great courage to speak in front of people.
sentence_2: She has the courage to try new things.
